embeds.description: 大家好，這裡是因為DC排版功能很爛只好來巴哈發長文的野貓。 撰寫本文的主要目的是投進DC伺服器的《有問必答》頻道裡，作為筆者對當前各深海角色的困境解讀，並對其中筆者較有靈感者提出一些調整建議，並記載筆者破防的心路歷程。除了向官方告知筆者的...

content: 圖魯目前的配對就是神國跟星辰篇限定的墨圖汀汀，前者仰賴觸手的觸手傷害及觸手數量，後者是超微空間後的一波大爆發用雙汀的增傷跟易傷對面打出超高的爆發。
thread_title: 【討論】星辰篇深海角色困境與建議｜截至v2.3.3.1版本

content: 試問觸手隊要在星辰篇要疊什麼，爆擊，爆傷，死抗，黑印，強效，精通，銀鑰還是狂充
thread_title: 【討論】星辰篇深海角色困境與建議｜截至v2.3.3.1版本

content: 觸手吃爆擊吃爆傷吃精通吃造物要穩定開鑰令，狂氣圖魯要，沒死抗你就要確保你的墨菲可以一直開大還有辦法消獻祭，沒強效就要確保圖魯在道中開局能開狂這個問題不大，精通加盾跟觸手打的次數
thread_title: 【討論】星辰篇深海角色困境與建議｜截至v2.3.3.1版本

content:
I'm having a hard time getting all of the traphase rewards and considering we have some little time, I don't think I will get them all.

Can you guys for example increase the points earned last 2 weeks by 2x so me and other people have a chance in getting all of the rewards?
thread_title: Traphase Rewards

content: pretty sure we still have 1 month before the disappearance of the record one time rewards
thread_title: Traphase Rewards

content: from my understanding, the next version next week will be 2.3.4, which will start featuring a timer to show there's a time limit left on these rewards, then on november 17th it will be removed on version 2.4, if development goes as planned
thread_title: Traphase Rewards

content:
tbh I agree about the points boost, mainly because not everyone will have the time to grind all the way up to 3000 for traphase and 30000 for phantasmal dive <:thinking1:1356068128936820929> 

not to mention there are new players every week, and a points boost should help in allowing them to reach maybe a few of the achievements <:thinking1:1356068128936820929>
thread_title: Traphase Rewards

content:
I believe 30k points on phantasmal dive isn't hard, if you borrow a support at least.
Traphase is entire different story though, and I can agree. Gaining 3K points in traphase puts you on top 30 of the whole game, it's rather insane in comparison
thread_title: Traphase Rewards

content: but I think instead of increasing the points gained, the game should reduce the points required on traphase record, to something like 1500, which puts you in the middle of the ranking I'm guessing, and should be somewhat "as easy" as phantasmal dive record challenge
thread_title: Traphase Rewards

content:
I personally have given up on completing all achievements and I don't mind not reaching them <:jenkin_idk:1334033449626894358> 

I just think that since this is quite a big change and the one-time rewards do give important materials, it would be nice if the points are boosted so everyone, no matter their level, can guarantee completion of at least half (if not all) of the achievements <:thinking1:1356068128936820929> 

The points boost can be implemented maybe during the last 1-2 weeks before the update
thread_title: Traphase Rewards

content: well that's an option too <:agree:1400771815076528258>
thread_title: Traphase Rewards
